comments.body: LGTM.  We weren't using `logrus.IsTerminal()`, so its removal doesn't affect us.
:clipboard: Looks like this PR is still in progress, ignoring approval
I missed the big WIP in the title. @TomSweeneyRedHat, is this ready to merge?

@vrothberg I just sat down to remove the WIP.  @jhonce had vendored 1.3 into Podman and I wanted to verify with him on that before removing the WIP.  We've both decided to go to 1.4.2, update incoming.
